SHAKE128_XOFz
A SHAKE128 hash object.
    Do not instantiate directly.
    Use the :func:`new` function.
    :ivar oid: ASN.1 Object ID
    :vartype oid: string
    z

Continue hashing of a message by consuming the next chunk of data.
        Args:
            data (byte string/byte array/memoryview): The next chunk of the message being hashed.
        z/You cannot call 'update' after the first 'read'z&Error %d while updating SHAKE128 state)

keccak_absorbr
lenr
SHAKE128_XOF.updatec
        Compute the next piece of XOF output.
        .. note::
            You cannot use :meth:`update` anymore after the first call to
            :meth:`read`.
        Args:
            length (integer): the amount of bytes this method must return
        :return: the next piece of XOF output (of the given length)
        :rtype: byte string
        Tz'Error %d while extracting from SHAKE128)	r

__doc__Z
oidr
Return a fresh instance of a SHAKE128 object.
    Args:
       data (bytes/bytearray/memoryview):
        The very first chunk of the message to hash.
        It is equivalent to an early call to :meth:`update`.
        Optional.
    :Return: A :class:`SHAKE128_XOF` object
    r
